title: 3D Nautilus Shell and Armor
description: Gives nautilus shell and armor a 3d model based on baby nautilus.
body:
**A resource pack that gives nautilus shell and armor a 3d model.**
  
> This pack features all types of armor from copper to diamond, all inspired by baby nautilus!

### No Mods Required!
  
> Models are visible in hands, inventory and in item frames.

### In game look:
![All the shells in one image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285f212bc4c65c4429d707b465f0c0e7636e6774.png)
